results.title: Astroboy 12
results.creator_credit: Carl Battaglia, Del Lewis, Nihon Terebi and Tezuka Productions
results.brief_description: Three epsiodes of the adventures of the boy robot Astro created by Osamu Tezuka. The titles include: “Speeding through the storm”; the D51 steam engine saves the day when Astro and his class mates are on a field trip: “The Rainbow comet”; Astro is blackmailed into joining the forces of evil when Atlas’ Crystal Castle kidnap Daddy Walrus’ class; “The Robots nobody wanted”; Astro assists three robots- a fireman, a nurse, and a welder who prove that they are worth more than scrap metal.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Carl Battaglia, Del Lewis, Nihon Terebi and Tezuka Productions

results.title: Astroboy 11
results.creator_credit: Carl Battaglia, Del Lewis, Nihon Terebi and Tezuka Productions
results.brief_description: Three epsiodes of the adventures of the boy robot Astro created by Osamu Tezuka. The titles include: “The Baby elephant”; Astro befriends an elephant who is orphaned when its mother wanders into a safari park; “The Transformation robot”; Pook is a special robot Astro meets on an island. Pook has the ability to transform himself into any shape, which can be dangerous if he gets into evil hands!; “The Crystal of the desert”; Astro discovers trouble when he investigates the cause of a series of strange droughts. It comes in the form of Atlas, living inside a crystal in the middle of the desert.
